notes: STAR's six-face arcana die. CLEAR PANE is the highest success — the glass cleared on its own. FOGGED is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The glass clears on its own. Advance two.
Success ★. The compressor holds the line. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. Frost on the freezer coil. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 FOG).
Partial. The brine smells iron. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 FOG).
Failure. The glass refogged in five seconds. +1 FOG.
Wild. ★★ if the dock door is open — the morning light is in the room. Otherwise: failure, and the neon ICE letters drop a half-tone.
